title: 5 Signs Your PC Needs a Professional Cleanup
excerpt: Is your PC running slower than usual? Here are 5 tell-tale signs that it's time for a professional cleanup.
content:
Over time, every PC accumulates digital clutter that slows it down. Here are 5 signs it's time for a cleanup:

1. Slow Boot Times

If your PC takes more than 2 minutes to boot, it's likely overloaded with startup programs and background processes.

2. Frequent Crashes

Random crashes and blue screens often indicate driver conflicts, corrupted system files, or failing hardware.

3. Low Storage Space

Running out of storage? Temporary files, old downloads, and system caches can eat up precious space.

4. Overheating

Dust buildup inside your PC case can cause overheating, leading to performance throttling and hardware damage.

5. Pop-ups and Unwanted Software

If you're seeing unusual pop-ups or browser redirects, your PC may have adware or unwanted programs installed.

Contact Vincent IT Freelancer for a thorough PC cleanup and optimization service!
author: Vincent IT

title: Microsoft Office vs LibreOffice: Which is Right for You?
excerpt: Comparing Microsoft Office and LibreOffice to help you decide which productivity suite fits your needs and budget.
content:
Choosing between Microsoft Office and LibreOffice can be tough. Here's a breakdown:

Microsoft Office

The industry standard with full-featured Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and Outlook. Offers cloud integration via OneDrive and regular updates. Best for professionals and students who need compatibility with others.

LibreOffice

A free, open-source alternative that supports most Office file formats. Includes Writer, Calc, Impress, and more. Great for basic document creation and editing without the cost.

Our Recommendation

For most users in Mahikeng, we recommend Microsoft Office for its reliability and compatibility. We offer affordable activation services for Office 2013 through 365.

Contact us for a discounted Office activation!
author: Vincent IT

title: How to Backup Your Data Before a Repair
excerpt: Essential steps to backup your important files before bringing your PC in for repair or maintenance.
content:
Before any PC repair, backing up your data is essential. Here's how:

1. Use an External Drive

Connect an external hard drive or USB stick and copy your important documents, photos, and videos manually.

2. Cloud Backup

Services like Google Drive, OneDrive, and Dropbox offer free storage up to 15GB. Upload your critical files.

3. Windows Backup Tool

Windows has a built-in backup tool (Control Panel > Backup and Restore) that can create a full system image.

4. What to Backup

Focus on: Documents, Photos/Videos, Bookmarks, Email files, and any work projects. Software can be reinstalled.

Remember: Vincent IT Freelancer is not liable for pre-existing data loss. Always backup before service!
author: Vincent IT
